nouns.summary: The text states that Ἑζεκίας is the person who “begat” (ἐγέννησεν) the following named individual.
The text presents Μανασσῆς as the one who “begat” (ἐγέννησεν) the next named person.
The text says that Ἀμὼς “begat” (ἐγέννησεν) the final named person, indicating he is acting as a parent in the genealogy.
Ἰωσίαν is named as the child who is “begotten” (ἐγέννησεν) by the preceding person in the sequence.
